_file_comment: Chronicles of Darkness — Mortals+ data file.
This file has three sections: CONFIGURATION, then CONTENT.
CONFIGURATION keys drive the app structure and should be edited carefully.
CONTENT keys are lists of game entries freely added, removed, or replaced.
Use the in-app Data Library import/export to share or update content safely.
_skills_comment: skill_definitions: ordered list of all skills available on the sheet.
key:      internal identifier used in saved characters (do not change after use)
label:    display name shown on the sheet (can be changed freely)
The 'athletics' key is referenced in the Defense formula.
Renaming its label is safe; changing its key will break Defense calculation.
To add a skill: append an entry. To remove: delete the entry.
Skills are shown in the order listed here.

skill_definitions.label: Athletics
skill_definitions._note: athletics key is used in the Defense formula — renaming the label is safe, but do not change the key

_sections_comment: section_definitions: ordered registry of every toggleable sheet section.
Each entry: { key, label, group, zone, order, type, default, [state_key], [max_rating], [max], [beats_key], [xp_key] }
key:        unique identifier for this section (used in sectionConfig)
label:      display name shown in the Sheet Configuration panel and on the PDF
group:      config panel group header: Mortal | Hunter | (future splats)
zone:       where on the sheet this section appears:
header            — character header row
beats             — beats/XP tracker row (between header and full-width-top)
full-width-top    — full-width area below beats, above the two columns
left-column       — left column (skills area)
right-column      — right column (traits/conditions area)
full-width-bottom — full-width area below the two columns
order:      sort order within the zone (lower = higher on sheet)
type:       rendering type — see list below
default:    true = visible by default, false = hidden by default
state_key:  STATE field this section reads/writes (defaults to key if omitted)
max_rating: for rated-list — maximum dot rating (default 5)
max:        for dot-track — number of dots (default 10)
beats_key:  for beats-xp — STATE key for the beats counter (default: 'beats')
xp_key:     for beats-xp — STATE key for the experience counter (default: 'experience')
Section types:
attributes      — the 9 core attributes (special renderer)
skills          — the 27 skills with rote/specialty (special renderer)
derived-traits  — health, willpower, defense, initiative, speed (special renderer)
dot-track       — a simple 1–N dot track (e.g. Integrity, Humanity)
header-fields   — text fields in the character header
beats-xp        — a beats counter + XP counter pair (zone: beats)
line-list       — a simple list of text lines (e.g. Aspirations, Touchstones)
named-list      — collapsible cards with name + description (e.g. Tilts, Tactics)
rated-list      — collapsible cards with name + rating + description (e.g. Merits, Endowments)
resource-track  — 20 manually-toggled squares in 2 rows of 10 (Mana, Essence, Vitae)
arcana-block    — fixed rated list from the section's fields array (Mage Arcana)
renown-block    — five named 5-dot tracks in a single block (Werewolf Renown)
forms-block     — live reference table showing per-form calculated stats
weapons         — weapon cards with full weapon fields (special renderer)
armor           — armor cards with full armor fields (special renderer)
equipment       — equipment cards with full equipment fields (special renderer)
textarea        — a multi-line text area (e.g. Notes, The Code)
dot-square-track — dot row (max rating) above square row (current value), like Willpower but data-driven (e.g. Clarity)
_presets_comment: Applying a preset does a full reset — all sections are set to the values listed.
Every section key must be present in each preset.
To add a preset: add an entry with a name and a config covering all section keys.
The 'Mortal' preset represents the default starting configuration.
_names_comment: mortal_names: names used by the Generate Baseline button.
Add or remove names freely. Order does not matter.
_lists_comment: The following lists are the content database for sheet dropdowns.
All lists are sorted alphabetically when loaded.
Use the in-app Data Library import/export to share or update these safely.
weapons:    { name, weapon_type, damage, initiative_mod, strength_req, size, availability, notes }
ranged weapons also need: ranges, clip
armor:      { name, armor_general, armor_ballistic, defense_penalty, speed_penalty, strength_req, availability, notes }
equipment:  { name, dice_bonus, durability, size, structure, availability, desc }

merits.name: Area of Expertise
merits.desc: Requires 2 Resolve and 1 Skill Specialty.Choose a Specialty to assign to this Merit. Forgo the +1 bonus afforded by a Specialty, in exchange for a +2.

merits.name: Ambidextrous
merits.desc: Available only at character creation. Your character does not suffer the -2 penalty for using his off hand in combat or to perform other actions.

armor.name: Reinforced Clothing
armor.notes: This armor is concealed. Covers torso, arms, and legs.

equipment.name: Flashlight
equipment.desc: Die bonus subtracts from any penalties due to darkness, and adds to any rolls to search in the dark. Some can also be used as a club. Also can blind a subject. Roll Dexterity + Athletics, subtracting opponent's Defense. The victim’s player. If your character scores more successes than the subject, the subject is blinded for one turn. Victims with especially acute senses are blinded for two turns.

equipment.name: Smartphone
equipment.desc: Increases dice bonus to +2 if bought at Availability 3. A smartphone with camera, GPS, and internet access. Battery lasts approximately one day of moderate use.

tilts.name: Arm Wrack
tilts.desc: One of the character's arms is damaged and unusable. They cannot use two-handed weapons or take actions requiring both arms. Any action suffers a -2 offhand penalty if taken with the offhand. Ended when the injury is healed.

tilts.name: Beaten Down
tilts.desc: The player must spend a point of Willpower each time he wants the character to take a violent action. Ends when the character surrenders.

conditions.name: Blind
conditions.desc: Any rolls requiring sight may only use a chance die. If another sense can be reasonably substituted, make the roll at -3 instead.

conditions.name: Inspired
conditions.desc: When your character takes an action pertaining to that inspiration, you may resolve this Condition. Gain a Willpower point, and consider the roll an Exceptional Success on three successes, instead of five

_endowments_comment: endowments: Hunter endowments from compacts and conspiracies.

endowments.name: Benediction: Aegis
endowments.desc: The hunter blesses herself against supernatural harm. For the rest of the scene she adds her Benediction dots as a bonus to resistance rolls against supernatural powers.

endowments.name: Castigation: Deny
endowments.desc: The hunter denies a supernatural being use of one of its powers for the scene. Contested roll: Presence + Intimidation vs. Resolve + Supernatural Tolerance.

endowments.name: Elixir: Clarity
endowments.desc: A distilled compound that clears supernatural mental influence. The drinker immediately ends any active Dominated, Enthralled, or mind-controlled Condition.

_werewolf_forms_comment: Each entry: { name, subtitle, attr_mods, size_mod, armor, perception_bonus, special_traits }
attr_mods: object of attribute keys to numeric modifiers (omit or set 0 for unchanged)
armor: flat armor value in this form
perception_bonus: flat bonus to Perception rolls
special_traits: array of strings listing form powers and notes
_rotes_comment: rotes: Mage rotes. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

rotes.name: Babel's Cure (Mind 2)
rotes.desc: The mage harmonises competing mental frequencies, allowing fluent communication across language barriers for a scene.

rotes.name: Cleanse the Body (Life 2)
rotes.desc: Purges toxins, disease, and minor supernatural taints from a living body, removing poison or disease Tilts on a success.

rotes.name: Ward (Prime 1)
rotes.desc: The mage inscribes a magical alarm on a surface or object; she is mentally alerted when a supernatural being touches or crosses it.

_arcana_attainments_comment: arcana_attainments: Mage Arcana Attainments. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

arcana_attainments.name: Covert Spell (Any 1)
arcana_attainments.desc: The mage has mastered subtle casting in her primary Arcanum; her spells in that Arcanum do not create Dissonance phenomena and are harder for Sleepers to notice.

arcana_attainments.name: Dedicated Magical Tool
arcana_attainments.desc: The mage has attuned a personal tool to her magic; when used as a Yantra it provides an additional bonus die beyond the standard Yantra bonus.

_legacy_attainments_comment: legacy_attainments: Mage Legacy Attainments. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

legacy_attainments.name: First Attainment
legacy_attainments.desc: The mage's first Legacy Attainment, unlocked upon joining the Legacy. Record the specific Attainment name and effect here.

legacy_attainments.name: Second Attainment
legacy_attainments.desc: The second Legacy Attainment, typically requiring Gnosis 3 or higher. Record the specific Attainment name and effect here.

_gifts_comment: gifts: Werewolf Gifts. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

gifts.name: Aspect of the Predator (Dominance 1)
gifts.desc: The werewolf projects predatory authority; most humans and animals give way without confrontation. Roll Presence + Intimidation; successes impose a penalty on targets who would oppose her physically.

gifts.name: Blood Surge (Strength 1)
gifts.desc: Floods the body with primal fury, adding the werewolf's Primal Urge to a single Strength roll as bonus dice. Can be used once per scene without cost.

gifts.name: Sense the Unnatural (Perception 1)
gifts.desc: The werewolf passively detects supernatural beings and phenomena within Primal Urge × 10 yards; she knows something is present and its general direction, but not its nature.

_rites_comment: rites: Werewolf Rites. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

rites.name: Rite of Dedication (Rite 1)
rites.desc: The werewolf dedicates a mundane item to her spiritual self; the item shifts with her through all forms and cannot be separated from her by mundane means.

rites.name: Rite of Healing (Rite 1)
rites.desc: A ceremony of blood and howling that accelerates supernatural recovery; each participant heals one additional lethal damage per day for the next week.

_disciplines_comment: disciplines: Vampire Disciplines. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

disciplines.name: Animalism 1: Feral Whispers
disciplines.desc: The vampire communicates directly with animals, conveying simple commands and receiving impressions in return; animals will not attack her unless compelled by supernatural means.

disciplines.name: Auspex 1: Heightened Senses
disciplines.desc: All physical senses operate at supernatural levels; the vampire can see in total darkness, hear whispered conversations across rooms, and smell individuals by their blood.

disciplines.name: Celerity 1: Swiftness
disciplines.desc: The vampire moves with inhuman speed; she adds her Celerity dots to Initiative and may move an additional number of yards equal to her Celerity on each action.

disciplines.name: Dominate 1: Mesmerise
disciplines.desc: The vampire issues a single spoken command which the target must obey immediately; the command must be short, direct, and completable within a few minutes.

disciplines.name: Resilience 1: Endurance
disciplines.desc: The vampire's flesh becomes unnaturally tough; she adds her Resilience dots to her effective Stamina for the purposes of resisting damage and environmental hazards.

_devotions_comment: devotions: Vampire Devotions and Coils. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

devotions.name: Coil of the Beast 1: Curb the Temptation
devotions.desc: The vampire has partially tamed her Beast; she gains a bonus to resist frenzy rolls and the threshold for triggering frenzy increases by one step.

devotions.name: Coil of Mortality 1: Mortal Resilience
devotions.desc: The vampire's body begins to mimic mortal processes; she no longer suffers the Aura flaw and passes as human to all mundane inspection including medical examination.

_vampire_rites_comment: vampire_rites: Vampire Rites and Miracles. Each entry: { name, rating, desc }

vampire_rites.name: Rite of the Sanguine Vessel (Rite 1)
vampire_rites.desc: The vampire consecrates a container of blood, preserving it indefinitely and imbuing it with minor restorative properties; drinking from it heals one bashing damage.

vampire_rites.name: Rite of Warding (Rite 1)
vampire_rites.desc: Marks a doorway or window with vitae-drawn symbols that alert the vampire when a supernatural being attempts to cross, waking her from day sleep if necessary.

_tactics_comment: tactics: Hunter tactics — coordinated cell manoeuvres.
desc: rules summary of what the tactic does and how to execute it

tactics.name: Arrest Momentum
tactics.desc: The cell coordinates to interrupt a fleeing or charging target. All participants delay their actions; when the target moves, each hunter makes a contested roll. On a success the target is Knocked Down or Immobilized for one turn.

tactics.name: Corral
tactics.desc: The cell manoeuvres to cut off escape routes. Each hunter takes position; the target must succeed on a Wits + Athletics roll penalised by the number of hunters participating or be unable to move more than a few feet without provoking an attack.

tactics.name: Covering Fire
tactics.desc: One hunter lays down suppressive fire while others advance. The firing hunter rolls Firearms; each success subtracts a die from the target's dice pool until the beginning of the firing hunter's next turn.

tactics.name: Cry Havoc
tactics.desc: The cell attacks simultaneously to overwhelm a target's defences. All participants must act in the same Initiative tick; each attacker after the first gains a cumulative +1 bonus to their attack roll.

tactics.name: Distract
tactics.desc: One hunter creates a diversion while others act. The distracting hunter makes a contested Presence + Persuasion or Dexterity + Larceny roll. On success, the target loses its Defence against the next attack made by a different cell member.

tactics.name: Exploit Opening
tactics.desc: The cell identifies and capitalises on a momentary weakness. When a target fails a roll or takes damage, any cell member may immediately make a reflexive attack against it without losing their action for the turn.

tactics.name: Flank
tactics.desc: Two or more hunters attack from opposite sides. Requires at least two participants. Both make simultaneous attacks; the target may only apply its Defence against one, and both attackers gain +1 to their rolls.

tactics.name: Forewarn
tactics.desc: A hunter on overwatch calls out threats before they materialise. At the start of each scene the hunter rolls Wits + Composure; each success grants one cell member a +1 bonus to their first action of the scene.

tactics.name: Holdout
tactics.desc: The cell fortifies a position and prepares to repel attackers. Each hunter nominates a covered position; attackers approaching the holdout suffer a penalty equal to the number of hunters in prepared positions.

tactics.name: Pile On
tactics.desc: Multiple hunters grapple or restrain a single target. Requires at least two participants. Each hunter after the first adds +2 to the grapple roll and the target suffers a cumulative penalty to escape attempts.

tactics.name: Pincer
tactics.desc: The cell splits and attacks from two directions simultaneously. Requires at least two hunters. The target must choose which group to face; the group it faces loses no Defence, but the group behind it attacks without the target's Defence applying.

tactics.name: Radio Silence
tactics.desc: The cell goes dark to avoid supernatural detection. All members suppress their supernatural signatures and communicate only by pre-arranged signals. Entities that track hunters by scent, aura, or similar means suffer a penalty equal to the cell's dots in the relevant Skill.

tactics.name: Rally
tactics.desc: A hunter's words steady the cell in a moment of crisis. As an instant action the hunter makes a Presence + Persuasion roll; each success removes one point of accumulated Willpower expenditure from one cell member.

tactics.name: Scatter
tactics.desc: The cell disperses to deny a target an easy kill. All members move in different directions on the same turn; area-of-effect attacks against the cell suffer a penalty equal to the number of hunters who successfully scatter.

tactics.name: Tail
tactics.desc: The cell follows a target without being detected. Hunters rotate surveillance in shifts; the target's Wits + Composure roll to notice surveillance is penalised by the number of hunters participating.

_contracts_comment: desc: include Cost, Dice pool, Action, Duration, Loophole, and Seeming Benefit where applicable

contracts.name: Contracts of Artifice 1: Knowing Touch
contracts.desc: Cost: 1 Glamour. Dice: Wits + Crafts + Wyrd. Action: Instant. Duration: Lasting. The changeling touches an object and learns its origin, maker, age, and any supernatural properties. Loophole: Free if the object was made by a hobgoblin or fetch. Seeming Benefit (Wizened): No cost if the object is a crafted tool.

contracts.name: Contracts of Dream 1: Pathfinder
contracts.desc: Cost: 1 Glamour. Dice: Wits + Survival + Wyrd. Action: Instant. Duration: Scene. The changeling always knows the fastest route to any location she has previously visited, and cannot become lost by mundane means. Loophole: Free if used in the Hedge. Seeming Benefit (Fairest): Also applies to places she has only heard described in vivid detail.

contracts.name: Contracts of the Hearth 1: Hospitality's Grace
contracts.desc: Cost: 1 Glamour. Dice: Presence + Socialize + Wyrd. Action: Instant. Duration: Scene. The changeling becomes a welcome guest; her host will not ask her to leave and gains a bonus on all social rolls made in the host's presence. Loophole: Free if the changeling has been formally invited. Seeming Benefit (Fairest): The bonus applies to all social rolls for the scene, not just those made near the host.

_pledges_comment: desc: include type (Sealing/Oath/Bargain), parties, boons, sanctions, and duration

pledges.name: Oath of the Iron Vow
pledges.desc: Type: Oath. A solemn promise sworn on cold iron. Boon: +2 to all rolls directly related to fulfilling the oath. Sanction: Breaking the oath inflicts a Clarity roll at −3 and costs all accumulated Glamour. Duration: Until fulfilled or broken.

pledges.name: Bargain of Fair Exchange
pledges.desc: Type: Bargain. A mutual agreement to exchange services or goods. Boon: Both parties gain the Informed Condition regarding the other's intent. Sanction: Defaulting party suffers −3 to all Social rolls with the other party for a month. Duration: Until both parties have fulfilled their obligations.

_praxes_comment: praxes: Mage Praxes — spells the Mage has mastered. Each entry: { name, desc }
_demonic_form_comment: demonic_form: a demon's Demonic Form manifestations. Each entry: { name, desc }

demonic_form.name: Claws
demonic_form.desc: The demon manifests razor-edged talons. Adds 2L damage to unarmed attacks. The claws count as a weapon for the purposes of the Relentless attack action.

demonic_form.name: Armored Plates
demonic_form.desc: Overlapping plates of supernatural material cover the demon's body, granting 2/2 armour that does not impose a Defense penalty.

demonic_form.name: Wings
demonic_form.desc: The demon grows functional wings, gaining a flight Speed equal to her normal Speed × 2. Hovering requires a Dexterity + Athletics roll in high winds.

_embeds_comment: embeds: a demon's known Embeds. Each entry: { name, desc }

embeds.name: Broadcast
embeds.desc: The demon subtly rewrites a mortal's memory of a single recent event, replacing it with a version the demon specifies. Contested: Manipulation + Subterfuge vs. Resolve + Composure. Duration: Permanent until contradicted.

embeds.name: Calculated Risk
embeds.desc: Cost: 1 Aether. The demon perceives probability distributions for the scene, gaining +2 to all dice pools involving risk assessment, gambling, and tactical planning.

embeds.name: Drop Cover
embeds.desc: The demon instantly shifts to a different active Cover. The old Cover is suspended, not destroyed. Instant action, no roll required.

_exploits_comment: exploits: a demon's known Exploits. Each entry: { name, desc }

exploits.name: Blackout
exploits.desc: Cost: 1 Aether. The demon generates an EMP that disables all non-Unchained technology within Primum × 3 yards for one scene. Dice: Presence + Science.

exploits.name: Hellfire
exploits.desc: Cost: 1 Aether. The demon hurls a bolt of divine fire dealing Primum lethal damage at Range: Primum × 5 yards. Dice: Dexterity + Firearms. Ignites flammable materials.

exploits.name: Vanish
exploits.desc: Cost: 1 Aether. The demon exits demonic form and refreshes her active Cover. All Compromise suspicion accrued this scene is erased. Instant action.

variations.name: Enhanced Physicality
variations.desc: Magnitude 1. The Deviant's body exceeds human limits in one physical attribute. Add Variation dots as bonus dice to all rolls using Strength, Dexterity, or Stamina (choose one at creation). Scar: Conspicuous (the enhancement is visibly inhuman).

variations.name: Regeneration
variations.desc: Magnitude 2. The Deviant heals damage at a supernatural rate, recovering one lethal damage per turn as a reflexive action. Bashing damage is cleared almost instantly. Cost: 1 Flux. Scar: Painful (the rapid healing is visibly and audibly disturbing).

variations.name: Sensory Expansion
variations.desc: Magnitude 1. The Deviant gains a new or greatly enhanced sense — infrared vision, echolocation, or the ability to detect electromagnetic fields. Add Variation as bonus dice to relevant Wits-based perception rolls. Scar: Vulnerable (the enhanced sensory organ is an obvious weak point).

variations.name: Elemental Blast
variations.desc: Magnitude 3. The Deviant projects destructive energy (fire, electricity, kinetic force) at Range: Variation × 5 yards, dealing Variation lethal damage. Dice: Dexterity + Athletics. Cost: 1 Flux. Scar: Volatile (uncontrolled discharges occur under stress — roll Composure or trigger automatically).

scars.name: Conspicuous
scars.desc: Magnitude 1. The Deviant's alteration is visibly inhuman and cannot be concealed by mundane means. −2 to all Social rolls with mortals who are not aware of the character's nature. Entangled Variations: note linked Variation(s) here.

scars.name: Painful
scars.desc: Magnitude 1. The Deviant's power activates with significant physical pain. Each use costs 1 point of bashing damage in addition to any other costs. Entangled Variations: note linked Variation(s) here.

scars.name: Volatile
scars.desc: Magnitude 2. The power triggers involuntarily under emotional stress. When the Deviant suffers a breaking point or reaches her last three Health boxes, roll Resolve or the Variation activates without her consent. Entangled Variations: note linked Variation(s) here.

scars.name: Vulnerable
scars.desc: Magnitude 1. A specific and obvious weak point exists on the Deviant's body. Attackers who target this location gain +2 to attack rolls and any damage dealt to it ignores the Deviant's Armour. Entangled Variations: note linked Variation(s) here.
